project_goal: Build an ETL pipeline that ingests daily sales CSV exports, validates and transforms them, loads them into a PostgreSQL warehouse, and produces weekly summary reports.

authority_sources.name: Source CSV schema
authority_sources.scope: field names and types in raw data

style_rules: All SQL queries parameterized — no string concatenation
Log all row counts at each pipeline stage
Idempotent loads: upsert on primary key

components.name: Ingest Module
components.description: Reads daily CSV exports from the landing zone, validates schema, and emits validated DataFrames.
quality_criteria: Handles missing and malformed rows without crashing
Logs all validation failures with row number and field name
Tests cover empty files, extra columns, and missing required columns

components.name: Transform Module
components.description: Applies business logic transformations: currency normalization, date parsing, and derived field calculation.
quality_criteria: Currency conversion uses a fixed reference rate per run (not live)
Tests cover edge cases for each transformation

components.name: Load Module
components.description: Loads transformed data into the PostgreSQL warehouse using upsert logic.
quality_criteria: Tests use a test database fixture

components.name: Weekly Summary Report
components.description: Generates a weekly PDF summary with top-line metrics, trend charts, and regional breakdowns.
quality_criteria: Report generated automatically on Monday mornings
All charts include axis labels and data source note
Report renders correctly for zero-data weeks
